missions.ko: 말 없이도 갈등이 읽히는 두 사람의 한 컷
missions.en: silent tension between two people, unspoken conflict, single frame

missions.ko: ‘다음에 무슨 일이 일어날지’ 궁금해지는 직전 순간만
missions.en: moment before the decisive action, suspense, anticipation

missions.ko: 기쁨·슬픔을 얼굴이 아니라 손·어깨·자세로만
missions.en: emotion through body language only, face hidden or turned away

missions.ko: 한 물건이 주인공인 이야기 (사람은 부차적이거나 없어도 됨)
missions.en: object as narrative protagonist, human secondary or absent

missions.ko: 거짓말·비밀이 드러날 듯한 순간의 시선
missions.en: eyes revealing lie or secret, guilt, micro-expression

missions.ko: 이별·끝난 뒤의 ‘빈자리’를 풍경 설명 없이 분위기로만
missions.en: absence after goodbye, emotional void, no literal empty chair

missions.ko: 누군가를 기다리는 몸짓만으로 시간이 느껴지게
missions.en: waiting gesture, passage of time implied, subtle impatience

missions.ko: 승리 직후 허무함이 스치는 표정
missions.en: hollow victory, bittersweet afterglow, post-climax

missions.ko: 첫 만남의 어색함을 시선만으로
missions.en: awkward first meeting, awkward eye contact, social distance

missions.ko: 퍼포먼스·댄스의 ‘정지한 한 순간’만 (연속 동작은 암시)
missions.en: frozen pose mid-dance, peak motion, kinetic energy implied

missions.ko: 연습실 거울 속 ‘아직 완성되지 않은’ 나
missions.en: incomplete self in mirror, practice room, rehearsal vulnerability

missions.ko: 무대 조명 속 정체가 흐릿한 실루엣
missions.en: silhouette under stage lights, anonymous performer

missions.ko: 관객 시점이 아닌 ‘무대 위에서 내려다본’ 한 장면
missions.en: performer POV looking at crowd lights, disorienting angle

missions.ko: 한 장의 이미지로 ‘이전’과 ‘이후’를 동시에 암시
missions.en: before and after in one frame, split implication, transition

missions.ko: 친구·라이벌·연인 중 무엇인지 모호한 관계
missions.en: ambiguous relationship, ambiguous intimacy, tension

missions.ko: 꿈과 현실이 경계에서 섞인 장면
missions.en: dream bleeding into reality, liminal space, surreal edge

missions.ko: 어른이 된 뒤의 첫 번째 실패를 겨우 참는 순간
missions.en: adult holding back tears, first big failure, dignity

missions.ko: 누군가를 위해 연기하는 ‘가짜 미소’
missions.en: performing happiness for someone else, fake smile

missions.ko: 소리가 들릴 것 같은 ‘함성 직전’의 입술
missions.en: mouth about to scream, breath held, pre-shout

missions.ko: 인물 없이 ‘누가 있었는지’만 남은 흔적
missions.en: absence of people, traces left behind, story without bodies

missions.ko: 밤버스 창밖 불빛만, 안은 한 사람의 침묵
missions.en: night bus interior, city bokeh outside, lone passenger, quiet

missions.ko: 백스테이지 테이프·의상랙·반만 켜진 거울등만으로 긴장감
missions.en: backstage clutter, costume rack, half-lit mirror, pre-show tension

missions.ko: 리허설과 본공의 ‘같은 포즈’인데 분위기만 다르게
missions.en: same pose rehearsal vs live, mood contrast, implied audience

missions.ko: 관객 머리 너머로만 보이는 무대 빛 (연주자는 프레임 밖)
missions.en: stage lights over crowd heads, performer implied off-frame

missions.ko: 빗방울이 유리에 뭉개진 창 너머, 안쪽 인물은 초점 밖
missions.en: rain on window, blurred figure inside, melancholy separation

missions.ko: 읽지 않은 메시지 직전—손만·호흡만 (화면 내용은 암시)
missions.en: unread message moment, hands and breath only, screen implied not literal

missions.ko: 같은 테이블인데 두 사람이 ‘한 프레임에 동시에’ 안 나오게
missions.en: same table split composition, two people never in same frame together

missions.ko: 고백 말이 끊기는 순간, 입보다 어깨·목선에 담기게
missions.en: confession interrupted, emotion in shoulders and neck not mouth

missions.ko: 연습생 복도 형광등 아래 길게 늘어진 그림자
missions.en: trainee hallway, harsh fluorescent, long shadows, institutional

missions.ko: 얼굴 없이 방송·팟캐스트 분위기 (마이크·손·책상만)
missions.en: streaming setup, mic and hands only, faceless host vibe

missions.ko: 옥상 난간 너머 도시, 인물은 작게 ‘남겨두고 간’ 느낌
missions.en: rooftop tiny figure against city, vast sky, leaving or staying ambiguous

missions.ko: 엘리베이터 문이 닫히며 사이에 낀 두 사람의 시선
missions.en: elevator doors closing, two people separated, eyes meet in gap

missions.ko: 의상 갈아입는 중 천이 공중에 멈춘 한순간
missions.en: mid costume change, fabric frozen in air, vulnerability implied

missions.ko: 어두운 방에서 터진 플래시 한 번에만 드러나는 실루엣
missions.en: single camera flash in dark room, silhouettes, paparazzi or party

missions.ko: 메이크업 의자에 기댄 새벽, 거울 속과 밖이 다른 온도
missions.en: makeup chair dawn exhaustion, mirror reflection colder than subject

missions.ko: ‘방금 누가 지나갔는지’ 복도 끝에만 남은 움직임
missions.en: corridor end motion blur only, who passed implied, empty hall

missions.ko: 새벽 지하철에서 말 없이 스치는 감정만 남긴 한 컷
missions.en: dawn subway, silent emotions only, single cinematic frame

missions.ko: 새벽 택시 뒷좌석에서 누군가를 기다리다 시선이 흐트러진 한 컷
missions.en: dawn taxi back seat, waiting gaze drifting, single cinematic frame

missions.ko: 새벽 옥상에서 거짓말을 삼키기 직전의 한 컷
missions.en: dawn rooftop, moment before swallowing a lie, single cinematic frame

missions.ko: 새벽 복도에서 작별 인사를 삼키기 직전의 한 컷
missions.en: dawn corridor, moment before swallowing goodbye, single cinematic frame

missions.ko: 새벽 연습실에서 박수 소리가 울리기 직전의 한 컷
missions.en: dawn practice room, moment before applause, single cinematic frame

missions.ko: 새벽 녹음실에서 거울과 눈이 마주친 한 컷
missions.en: dawn recording booth, eyes meeting mirror, single cinematic frame

missions.ko: 새벽 방송 대기실에서 문 손잡이에 손이 닿기 직전의 한 컷
missions.en: dawn broadcast waiting room, hand on door handle, single cinematic frame

emotions.en: suppressed rage about to break, jaw clenched
sudden kinship with stranger, fleeting connection
trying not to blame, forgiveness struggle
vague hope for future, soft light

emotions.ko: 끝난 줄 알았는데 아직 남은 미련

emotions.en: loneliness under spotlight, isolation in fame
numb joy from overused praise, hollow validation

emotions.ko: 떠나기 전 마지막으로 남기고 싶은 말이 막히는 순간
emotions.en: words stuck before leaving, throat tight, unfinished sentence

emotions.ko: 남이 보기엔 성공인데 본인만 아는 공허
emotions.en: success that feels empty only to the one who achieved it

emotions.ko: 잘못을 인정하면 무너질 것 같은 두려움
emotions.en: fear that admitting fault will collapse everything
jealousy wedged into old friendship, guilty affection
when cheering becomes pressure, expectations crushing
promise only one person remembers, asymmetric nostalgia

emotions.ko: 돌아가도 달라지지 않을 거란 걸 아는 체념

emotions.en: brief kinship with stranger in unfamiliar city

emotions.ko: 누군가를 미워해도 되는지 모르는 어린 마음
emotions.en: childlike confusion whether hating is allowed

emotions.ko: 박수가 멈춘 뒤의 정적이 더 크게 들릴 때
emotions.en: silence after applause louder than the crowd

emotions.ko: 사과하고 싶은데 자존심이 먼저 나올 때

emotions.en: eyes right after saying I'm fine, betraying the lie
lonely together, emotional distance in proximity

emotions.ko: 다음 무대가 두렵기보다 끝나는 게 두려울 때
emotions.en: fear of ending more than fear of next performance

constraints.en: face not visible, back view or obscured, face out of frame

constraints.ko: 색은 세 가지 이하로만 쓴다고 상상하고 구성
constraints.en: limited color palette, max three dominant colors

constraints.ko: 화면에 글자는 최대 한 단어 (또는 없음)
constraints.en: at most one word of text, or no text
mostly symmetrical composition, one asymmetrical break

constraints.ko: 광원은 딱 한 곳만 있다고 가정
constraints.en: single light source, hard shadows
focus on hands and fingers, gesture storytelling
feet and shoes tell story, stance, stance
generous negative space, loneliness or anticipation
tiny figure, vast environment, atmosphere
reflection, mirror, double meaning
motion implied by blur, streaks, flow lines
one small creature or pet, symbolic
subject looking off-frame, unseen focus
blue hour before sunrise, cool ambient
lens flare, bloom, imperfect optics
visible texture, grain, canvas tooth
diptych feel, montage within one frame, layered time
digital mood without literal screens, abstract tech feeling
visual humor only, no caption, slapstick subtle
aftermath of violence, no gore, implied only

constraints.ko: 수평선은 기울이지 말고, 대신 인물·소품만 기울게
constraints.en: level horizon, dutch angle via subject tilt only, unsettling stability
clue only at frame edge, partial reveal, viewer completes story

constraints.ko: 실내인데 창문 너머 날씨가 이야기의 감정을 대신
constraints.en: interior scene, weather through window mirrors emotion
one person visible, second presence via shadow reflection clothing

constraints.ko: 초점은 앞이 아니라 화면 깊이 중간 어딘가
constraints.en: shallow depth, subject slightly soft, midground sharp

constraints.ko: 시간대는 골든 아워 단 한 컷
constraints.en: golden hour only, warm rim light, single moment of day
heavy vignette, tunnel vision, claustrophobic framing
pattern overlay, mesh fence, blinds splitting face
atmospheric haze, dust or smoke, volumetric light beams
split color temperature, warm vs cool in same frame

constraints.ko: 인물 높이의 절반 이하는 프레임에 안 들어오게 (크롭)
constraints.en: crop above waist or higher, no feet, intimate fragment
no straight-on face, three-quarter back or high angle only

constraints.ko: 소품은 세 개 이하, 각각 이름 붙일 수 있을 만큼만
constraints.en: max three named props, minimal clutter, symbolic objects
natural light only implied, no visible studio gear

constraints.ko: 한 장에 계절은 하나만 (눈·벚꽃·낙엽 등 혼합 금지)
constraints.en: single season cues only, no mixed seasonal symbols

constraints.ko: 대지의 질감(종이·캔버스)이 피사체와 동등한 비중을 갖게
constraints.en: substrate texture equal weight to subject

constraints.ko: 인물이 있더라도 ‘시선의 목표’는 항상 화면 밖
constraints.en: gaze target always off-frame even if figure present
single highlight point only

constraints.ko: 그림자는 부드럽게, 경계선은 단 하나만 날카롭게
constraints.en: soft shadows one hard edge only

constraints.ko: 원근법은 망가져도 되지만 ‘한 줄기’ 수직은 지키게
constraints.en: broken perspective but one true vertical
shallow DOF background as color mass only
at most one door or window in frame

constraints.ko: 인물 수는 최대 둘—셋 이상이면 실루엣으로 합치기
constraints.en: max two figures or merge extras as silhouettes

constraints.ko: 빛의 색은 한 종류—그림자만 다른 색온도 허용
constraints.en: one light color temperature shadows may contrast

constraints.ko: 질감 대비: 매끈한 것 하나와 거친 것 하나만
constraints.en: texture contrast one smooth one rough only
broken horizon not continuous
symmetry with one deliberate off-center point
handwritten text only if any no print fonts

constraints.ko: 비 오는 날이면 유리에만 초점—밖은 추상적으로
constraints.en: rain focus on glass outside abstract
night scene single neon hue only
figure: occupies at most one third of the frame
figure: blown out with intentional overexposure
figure: read only as silhouette
figure: simplified to flat color planes
figure: implied only outside the frame
figure: placed only on diagonals

constraints.ko: 인물은 프레임 중심에서 비우고 가장자리에만 두게
constraints.en: figure: emptied from center pushed to edges
figure: appears only as soft layered blur
figure: expressed only as repeating pattern

constraints.ko: 인물은 한 가지 색의 농도 변화로만 묘사해
constraints.en: figure: rendered only by one color value steps
background: occupies at most one third of the frame
background: blown out with intentional overexposure
background: read only as silhouette
background: simplified to flat color planes
background: implied only outside the frame
background: placed only on diagonals

constraints.ko: 배경은 프레임 중심에서 비우고 가장자리에만 두게
constraints.en: background: emptied from center pushed to edges
background: appears only as soft layered blur
background: expressed only as repeating pattern

constraints.ko: 배경은 한 가지 색의 농도 변화로만 묘사해
constraints.en: background: rendered only by one color value steps
light source: occupies at most one third of the frame
light source: blown out with intentional overexposure
light source: read only as silhouette
light source: simplified to flat color planes
light source: implied only outside the frame
light source: placed only on diagonals

constraints.ko: 광원은 프레임 중심에서 비우고 가장자리에만 두게
constraints.en: light source: emptied from center pushed to edges
light source: appears only as soft layered blur
light source: expressed only as repeating pattern

constraints.ko: 광원은 한 가지 색의 농도 변화로만 묘사해
constraints.en: light source: rendered only by one color value steps
color: occupies at most one third of the frame
color: blown out with intentional overexposure
color: read only as silhouette
color: simplified to flat color planes
color: implied only outside the frame
color: placed only on diagonals

constraints.ko: 색은 프레임 중심에서 비우고 가장자리에만 두게
constraints.en: color: emptied from center pushed to edges
color: appears only as soft layered blur
color: expressed only as repeating pattern

constraints.ko: 색은 한 가지 색의 농도 변화로만 묘사해
constraints.en: color: rendered only by one color value steps
texture: occupies at most one third of the frame
texture: blown out with intentional overexposure
texture: read only as silhouette
texture: simplified to flat color planes
texture: implied only outside the frame
texture: placed only on diagonals

constraints.ko: 질감은 프레임 중심에서 비우고 가장자리에만 두게
constraints.en: texture: emptied from center pushed to edges
texture: appears only as soft layered blur
texture: expressed only as repeating pattern

constraints.ko: 질감은 한 가지 색의 농도 변화로만 묘사해
constraints.en: texture: rendered only by one color value steps

cinematic still, movie color grade, 2.39:1 feel
music video thumbnail, bold typography optional
high contrast black and white, noir
neon line art, black background, glow
Polaroid instant photo, white frame, faded colors, flash
35mm film scan, grain, light leaks, subtle dust
woodcut print, bold carved lines, high contrast
oil pastel, smudged strokes, tactile messy edges
glitch art, RGB split, corrupted beauty
isometric diorama, toy-like scene, clean shadows
chiaroscuro oil, dramatic light, classical composition
ukiyo-e woodblock, flat planes, bold outlines
magazine full bleed ad, bold type zone, glossy
stop-motion still, slight pose awkwardness, tactile set
pencil underdrawing with flat acrylic color blocks
cyberpunk neon city, tiny figure, rain reflections
mid-century modern illustration, flat shapes, limited palette
drive-in cinema neon, Americana dusk, nostalgic
